creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Ramadan Street Food Festival in Karama is a wonderful foodie destination! 

Here are the reasons why you should check it out. 

• Great deals and discounts at participating restaurants! There are over 50 to choose from.
• Lots of hidden gems and amazing culinary experiences; from quirky contemporary snacks to authentic delicacies.
• Amazing street performances
• Picture-perfect Ramadan lights

🗓 March 31 to April 9, 2023
📍Sheikh Hamdan Colony, Karama
🚅 10 minutes walk from Burjuman Metro Station 

Tag your foodie buddies!
